name: Art Plan
description: Planning document for a single illustration slot. Specifies what to illustrate and why, leaving visual language details to the Style Guide. Planning is cheap—create Art Plans for ALL worthy scenes. Generation is selective based on priority and budget.

fields.name: section_ref
fields.description: Reference to the section this illustration supports (e.g., 'act1/foreman-gate')

fields.name: purpose
fields.description: Why this illustration helps: clarify (make described thing legible), recall (aid memory), mood (set atmosphere), signpost (reduce hesitation at choices)

fields.name: purpose_rationale
fields.description: 1-2 sentences explaining why this image helps the reader here

fields.name: subject
fields.description: What the image shows (concrete nouns, not abstractions)

fields.name: focal_point
fields.description: What must be readable/clear at target sizes

fields.name: composition_hint
fields.description: Brief framing guidance (e.g., 'low angle, tight on badge area'). Detailed conventions come from Style Guide.

fields.name: caption
fields.description: One-line player-safe caption (atmospheric/clarifying, no technique, no spoilers)

fields.name: alt_text
fields.description: One-sentence accessible description (subject + relation + location, spoiler-safe)

fields.name: reference_refs
fields.description: References to Reference Sheets for recurring elements in this image (characters, locations, objects)

fields.name: placement
fields.description: Where the image appears relative to prose

fields.name: inclusion_condition
fields.description: When this image should appear (e.g., 'first appearance of gate', 'after player obtains badge')

fields.name: exclusion_condition
fields.description: When this image should NOT appear

fields.name: accessibility_notes
fields.description: Any accessibility concerns (contrast, busy textures, content warnings)

states.name: Draft
states.description: Plan is being created by Art Director

states.name: Ready
states.description: Plan is complete and ready for generation when budget allows

states.name: Rendered
states.description: Image has been generated and linked

states.name: Deferred
states.description: Plan exists but generation deferred (plan-only release)
